description_long: This is a high-top sneaker featuring a deep navy blue fabric upper with visible white stitching and a white rubber sole. The shoe has a classic lace-up design with white laces threaded through metal eyelets, and a small orange tag is attached to the side panel. The tongue displays a circular logo patch with the word 'IMMORTALS' and a stylized emblem. The collar is padded for comfort, and there is a pull tab at the heel for easy wearing. The overall construction suggests durability and comfort, suitable for urban environments and casual wear.
description: A navy blue high-top sneaker with white laces, a white sole, and a visible logo patch on the tongue, accented by an orange side tag.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white laces, logo patch on the tongue, and rounded toe.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the orange side tag, stitching details, and the high-top collar.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the padded heel, pull tab, and white sole wrapping around the back.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing stitching, high-top structure, and the clean side profile.
attribute_logo: Circular logo patch on the tongue, white on black background, with the word 'IMMORTALS' and a stylized emblem.
